## Summary

<!-- Describe your changes in 2-3 sentences. Focus on WHY, not just WHAT. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses. Use "Closes #123" to auto-close. -->
<!-- If no issue exists, explain the motivation here. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `deps` — Dependency update
- [ ] `security` — Security fix or hardening
- [ ] `test` — Test addition or improvement
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, tooling

## Checklist

### Code quality
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` reports no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` passes with no failures
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md is updated (if public API, CLI flags, env vars, or usage changed)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md is updated (if architecture, conventions, or commands changed)
- [ ] Code comments are in English

### Impact review
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in committed files
- [ ] No breaking changes — or clearly documented in the PR description
- [ ] This PR addresses a single concern

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->
<!-- Examples: unit tests added, manual stdio test, docker build tested locally -->
